dict.string: Control Nothing Ear 2 noise cancellation from Alfred

cat <<'EOF' {"items":[ {"uid":"battery","title":"Battery","subtitle":"Check battery levels","arg":"battery","icon":{"path":"icons/battery.png"}}, {"uid":"off","title":"Off","subtitle":"Disable noise control","arg":"off","icon":{"path":"icons/off.png"}}, {"uid":"transparency","title":"Transparency","subtitle":"Hear your surroundings","arg":"transparency","icon":{"path":"icons/transparency.png"}}, {"uid":"high","title":"Noise Cancellation (High)","subtitle":"Maximum noise cancellation","arg":"high","icon":{"path":"icons/high.png"}}, {"uid":"mid","title":"Noise Cancellation (Mid)","subtitle":"Moderate noise cancellation","arg":"mid","icon":{"path":"icons/mid.png"}}, {"uid":"low","title":"Noise Cancellation (Low)","subtitle":"Light noise cancellation","arg":"low","icon":{"path":"icons/low.png"}}, {"uid":"adaptive","title":"Adaptive","subtitle":"Automatically adjust noise cancellation","arg":"adaptive","icon":{"path":"icons/adaptive.png"}} ]} EOF
xattr -d com.apple.quarantine ./bin/nothing-ctl 2>/dev/null if [ "{query}" = "battery" ]; then ./bin/nothing-ctl battery 2>/dev/null | tr '\n' ' ' else ./bin/nothing-ctl anc {query} >/dev/null fi

Control Nothing Ear 2 noise cancellation from Alfred.
Type "ear" to see all modes. Select one and press Enter to activate.
Requirements: - Nothing Ear 2 paired and connected via Bluetooth - Alfred must have Bluetooth permission (System Settings > Privacy & Security > Bluetooth)
Build the CLI: cd cli && swift build -c release cp .build/release/nothing-ctl ../workflow/bin/nothing-ctl
